# Breeze

> Shenzhen engineering partner for AI hardware. Concept to production.

Breeze is a Shenzhen-based engineering services firm helping AI hardware founders move from concept to production. We provide BOM cost estimation, NRE budgeting, design-for-manufacturing review, and certification navigation (FCC, CE, UKCA, RCM, CCC). Open data behind every tool — audit our numbers before you trust them.

## Tools

- [BOM Cost Estimator](https://breezehw.com/tools/bom-estimator): 1K-volume component pricing for ESP32-S3, Rockchip RV1103/RK3562/RK3588S, MediaTek Genio, plus typical sensor/power/memory stacks.
- [NRE Simulator](https://breezehw.com/tools/nre-simulator): Non-recurring engineering cost estimate for first production run — molds, certifications, samples, factory setup.
- [DFM Checklist](https://breezehw.com/tools/dfm-checklist): Design-for-manufacturing review surfacing thermal, antenna, layout, and certification blockers.
- [Cert Navigator](https://breezehw.com/tools/cert-navigator): FCC / CE / UKCA / RCM / CCC matrix — what applies, typical cost, typical timeline.

## Open data

- [AI Hardware Toolkit on GitHub](https://github.com/jianjettfu-oss/ai-hardware-toolkit): the data and checklists behind every Breeze tool. MIT licensed.

## Resources

- [Breeze Outreach Kit (PDF)](https://breezehw.com/breeze-outreach-kit.pdf)
- [Breeze Deck (PDF)](https://breezehw.com/breeze-deck.pdf)

## Team

- Jett Fu — founder of AirPop (respiratory wearables, global distribution); 10+ years consumer hardware in Shenzhen.
- Arting — incubator and outbound; embedded AI deal flow.
- Sky — engineering delivery; factory relationships, cost negotiation, production ramp.
